privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data within a Drupal Commerce test environment. The parent product 'Dell XPS 13 Laptop' is created programmatically with a base variation (SKU: DELL-XPS13-BASE, Price: $999.99). The task requires adding two product variations: Variation 1 with SKU 'DELL-XPS13-16-512', price '$1249.99', and title fragment '16GB/512GB'; Variation 2 with SKU 'DELL-XPS13-32-1TB', price '$1599.99', and title fragment '32GB/1TB'. Both must be linked to the parent product and published. Success is verified through database queries checking SKU existence, price values, publication status (status=1), and linkage to the parent product.
